cards.name: Open Portals
abilities: [keyword:Phasing]
[hc:ranged]: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Defend this Dimension
abilities: [hc:instinct]: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Sift Futures
abilities: [keyword:Phasing]
Choose a Hero Class. Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the Hero Class you named, draw it.

cards.name: Invoke the Time Stone
abilities: [keyword:Phasing]
[hc:ranged] [keyword:Sacrifice]: Take another turn after this one. Don't play a card from the Villain Deck at the start of that turn.

cards.name: Bind Evil
abilities: [hc:instinct]: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Marster Strike, KO that Strike, you get +3[icon:attack], and put a card from the Bystander Deck on top of the Villain Deck.

cards.name: 1 in 14,000,065
abilities: [hc:instinct] [keyword:Sacrifice]: Guess the name of the top card of the Villain Deck, then reveal it. If you guessed right, draw six cards.

cards.name: Wakanda Forever
abilities: [hc:covert]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Avengers Reassembled
abilities: If you have all five Hero Classes, you get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Great Many Lives Lost
abilities: [hc:instinct] [keyword:Sacrifice]: KO up to two cards from your hand and/or discard pile.

cards.name: Council of War
abilities: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each other [rule:multicolored] Hero you have.
[hc:strength]: You may have this card make all [icon:attack] instead of [icon:recruit].

cards.name: Vibranium Nanites
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's [rule:multicolored], draw it. Otherwise, put it back or discard it.
[hc:tech]: You may KO that card.

cards.name: Fateful Return
abilities: You get +2[icon:attack] for each Hero Class you have.

cards.name: Burst of Rage
abilities: [hc:strength] [keyword:Sacrifice]: You get +3[icon:attack]. You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Brains and Brawn
abilities: [hc:tech][hc:strength]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Hulkbuster Armor
abilities: You may KO a Wound from your hand or discard pile. If you do, you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Hulk Gets Smashed
abilities: [hc:strength]: You main gain a Wound. If you do, KO up to two other cards from your hand and/or discard pile.

cards.name: Crush Puny Weaklings
abilities: [hc:tech]: You get +1[icon:attack] for each Henchman in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Reverse the Snap
abilities: [hc:tech] [keyword:Sacrifice]: Gain up to one other Hero from the KO pile. Then combine you deck and discard pile. Put all those cards that cost 0 into your discard pile. Shuffle the rest into a new deck.

cards.name: Dawning Hope
abilities: Draw a card.
If you had already drawn any cards this turn, draw two cards instead.

cards.name: Infused by the Tesseract
abilities: Draw a card.
[keyword:Endgame]: This card makes [icon:attack] instead of [icon:recruit].

cards.name: Return from the Stars
abilities: [hc:strength]: You get +2[icon:recruit].
[keyword:Endgame]: This card makes all [icon:attack] instead of [icon:recruit].

cards.name: Turning Point
abilities: For the rest of this turn, it is the [keyword:Endgame] for your Hero cards.
If it was already the [keyword:Endgame], you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Moment of Destiny
abilities: [hc:ranged]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Time to End It
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other [hc:ranged] and/or [hc:strength] card you played this turn.
[keyword:Endgame]: Instead, you get +2[icon:attack] for each.

cards.name: We Have to Destroy It
abilities: [hc:tech] [keyword:Sacrifice]: You get +3[icon:recruit]. You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Witchcraft
abilities: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it has an odd-numbered cost, draw it. ( 0 is even.)

cards.name: Hold On
abilities: [hc:covert]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Let Go
abilities: [hc:ranged] [keyword:Sacrifice]: Draw 3 cards. You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Magic
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other Hero with an odd-numbered cost you played this turn.

cards.name: Science
abilities: [hc:tech]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Rage
abilities: If a Hero was put into the KO pile this turn you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Grief
abilities: If a Master Strike was completed this turn, you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Odd Couple
abilities: [hc:ranged]: Reveal the top five cards of the Hero Deck. You may put one of them with an odd-numbered cost into your hand. You may KO one of them. Put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Thanos
abilities: Thanos get +1[icon:attack] for each Infinity Stone in the city and/or Escape Pile.
Always Leads: Infinity Stones
Master Strike: The leftmost Infinity Stone in the city escapes. Then an Infinity Stone worth 4VP or more enters the city from your Victory Pile. If you didn't have any, each player gains a Wound.
Thanos Wins: When 6 Infinity Stones escape.

cards.name: Epic Thanos
abilities: Thanos get +2[icon:attack] for each Infinity Stone in the city and/or Escape Pile.
Always Leads: Infinity Stones

Master Strike: The lowest [icon:attack] Infinity Stone in the city escapes. Then an Infinity Stone worth 4VP or more enters the city from your Victory Pile. Each player that didn't have any gains a Wound.
Thanos Wins: When 6 Infinity Stones escape.

cards.name: The Snap
abilities: Fight: Each other player discards half of their cards. Destroy half of the HQ spaces. (Round down the losses.) Turn the Heroes there face down to mark the destroyed spaces. Don't refill those spaces.

cards.name: Destiny Arrives All the Same
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals a Hero that costs 7 or more or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Price to Pay
abilities: Fight: Each other player discards cards equal to the number of Infinity Stones in the city and/or Escape Pile or gains a Wound.

cards.name: You Should Have Gone for the Head
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes.
If this is the last Mastermind Tactic: You do not win the game. Players must fight Thanos one more time to put the Mastermind card in their Victory Pile and win the game.

cards.name: Ebony Maw
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +4[icon:attack]
Always Leads: Children of Thanos
Master Strike: It is the [keyword:Endgame] this turn. Each player reveals their hand and discards their highest-cost Hero. If it was already the [keyword:Endgame], KO those Heroes.

cards.name: Epic Ebony Maw
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +5[icon:attack]
Always Leads: Children of Thanos
Master Strike: It is the [keyword:Endgame] this turn. Each player reveals their hand and KOs their highest-cost Hero. If it was already the [keyword:Endgame], play another card from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Your Powers are Quaint
abilities: Fight: Each other player chooses a Hero Class, then reveals their hand and discards all non-grey Heroes that aren't that Hero Class.
[keyword:Endgame]: Then they also discard all grey Heroes.

cards.name: Hear Me and Rejoice
abilities: Fight: When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, draw two extra cards.
[keyword:Endgame]: Same effect, but three cards instead.

cards.name: Smile...Even in Death
abilities: Fight: KO up to two of your Heroes.
[keyword:Endgame]: Then KO up to one Hero from your discard pile.

cards.name: You May Think This is Suffering
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or gains a Wound.
[keyword:Endgame]: Then each other player reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Endless Armies of Chitauri
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +2[icon:attack]
Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Then reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Children of Thanos Villain, Endless Armies of Chitauri reenters the Sewers.

cards.name: Outriders
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +2[icon:attack]
Fight: You may KO a card from your discard pile.

cards.name: Outrider Dropships
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +2[icon:attack]
Ambush: A Villain worth 2VP, 3VP, or 4VP from any player's Victory Pile enters the city.

cards.name: Outrider Threshers
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +2[icon:attack]
Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Then choose any number of Heroes from the HQ. Put them on the bottom of the Hero Deck.

cards.name: Cull Obsidian
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +3[icon:attack]
Ambush: It is the [keyword:Endgame] this turn. If it was already the [keyword:Endgame], each player reveals a Hero that costs 6 or more or gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Corvus Glaive
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +3[icon:attack]
Ambush: It is the [keyword:Endgame] this turn. If it was already the [keyword:Endgame], each player KOs a Bystander from their Victory Pile or gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Chitauri Gorilla
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +2[icon:attack]
Ambush: Chitauri Gorilla captures a Bystander.

cards.name: Proxima Midnight
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +3[icon:attack]
Ambush: It is the [keyword:Endgame] this turn. If it was already the [keyword:Endgame], each player reveals an [hc:instinct] Hero or gains a Wound.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: The Power Stone
abilities: The Power Stone gets +1[icon:attack] for each other Infinity Stone in the city and/or Escape Pile.
Ambush: Each player without an Infinity Stone in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Then KO a Wound from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: The Space Stone
abilities: The Space Stone gets +1[icon:attack] for each empty space in the city.
Ambush: The Space Stone captures three Bystanders. Then move an Infinity Stone from any city space to the Bridge. If there's already a Villain there, swap them.
Fight: Move and/or swap any number of Villains to other city spaces.

cards.name: The Reality Stone
abilities: The Reality Stone gets +1[icon:attack] for each Master Strike in the KO pile and/or stacked next to the Mastermind.
Ambush: Reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. Play a Master Strike from among them. Put the rest back in any order.
Fight: Same effect, but KO the Master Strike instead of playing it. Then, whether you KO or not, put a card from the Bystander Deck on top of the Villain Deck.

cards.name: The Time Stone
abilities: [keyword:Endgame]: +4[icon:attack]
Ambush: Play another card from the Villain Deck.
Fight: Take another turn after this one. Don't play a card from the Villain Deck at the start of that turn.

cards.name: The Soul Stone
abilities: The Soul Stone gets +1[icon:attack] for each other Villain in the city.
Ambush: Each player without an Infinity Stone in their Victory Pile KOs a non-grey Hero from their discard pile.
Fight: Reveal the top two cards of your deck, KO one of them and draw the other.

cards.name: The Mind Stone
abilities: The Mind Stone gets +[icon:attack] equal to the highest cost of Hero in the HQ.
Ambush: All Heroes currently in the HQ cost 2 more this turn.
Fight: Gain a Hero from the HQ.

cards.name: Nebula, Stone Seeker
abilities: Ambush: Nebula captures a Hero from the Officer Deck or HQ that costs 4 or less.
Fight: Either KO that Hero or choose a player to gain it.
(This card counts as ”an Infinity Stone.”)

cards.name: Stonekeeper
abilities: Ambush: If the Soul Stone is in the city or Escape Pile, each player discards a card. If it's in a player's Victory Pile, that player draws two cards.
Fight: Each player KOs one of their Heroes.
(This card counts as ”an Infinity Stone.”)
Setup: Twists equal to the number of players plus 4.

Twist: You may KO one of your non-grey Heroes and one of your grey Heroes to ”Sacrifice for the Soul Stone.” If you do, draw three cards, shuffle this Twist back into Villain Deck, then play another card from the Villain Deck. If you don't, stack a Hero from the HQ next to the Mastermind, ”Sacrificed for the Soul Stone.”
Evil Wins: When the Mastermind has sacrificed 5 Heroes for the Soul Stone.

schemes.name: Halve All Life in the Universe

abilities: Setup: 5 Twists
Twist 1,3,5: Choose 3 Heroes from the HQ and KO them.
Twist 2,4: Deal the Hero Deck into two facedown piles (as equally as possible). KO one of them.
Evil Wins: When the Hero Deck or Villain Deck runs out.

schemes.name: Warp Reality into a TV Show

abilities: Setup: 11 Twists. The rightmost city space represents a TV show from ”the 50s.” The space on its left is ”the 60s,” then ”the 70s.” The city is only those 3 spaces. The HQ is only the 3 spaces beneath those. Move the Mastermind & Officer Deck to mark the city's left edge.
Twist 1-4: Another TV show (city space) appears on the left side of the city, representing the 80s, 90s, 2000s, & 2010s. Another HQ space appears beneath it.
Twist 5-11: Destroy the rightmost TV show and the HQ space beneath it. KO any Hero in that HQ space. Push forward any Villain there. Move the Villain Deck & Hero Deck to mark the city's right edge.
Evil Wins: When all TV is destroyed.

Setup: 11 Twists. Use 4 Heroes in the Hero Deck, plus 4 other Heroes to make a ”Past Hero Deck.” Above the board, make room for an alternate city called ”The Past.” It has the normal 5 spaces, from Sewers to Bridge. The Past has its own ”Past HQ” filled by the ”Past Hero Deck.” To start, play as if ”The Past” city, HQ, and Hero Deck don't exist.

Twist 1,3,5,7,9: Until the next Twist, move the Villain Deck next to ”The Past,” and play as if ”The Past” city, HQ, and Hero Deck exist, while the normal city, HQ, and Hero Deck don't exist. (Use the normal decks and spaces for everything except the city, HQ, and Hero Deck.)
Twist 10: Evil wins!
